name: skillos
description: SkillOS is decentralized-AI (DeAI) capability-measurement infrastructure — "Proof of Skill." Wires @skillos/sdk + @skillos/mcp into skill arenas (coding, research, agentic, negotiation) and reference game implementations (puzzle, word, match, retro arcade, speedrun, rhythm, trivia, typing, math) for permissionless arenas, on-chain skill leaderboards, per-axis skill credentials, and sponsor-funded payout pools on Base. Resolution via replay attestation or staked resolution; verified measurement data flows through an x402 data marketplace. Includes per-game builder-code map, mandatory post-merge live attribution verification (X10 lesson), and structured error handling (X9 lesson). Testnet now; mainnet Q3 2026, audit-gated.

when_to_invoke: User mentions arena, tournament, leaderboard, score submission, payout, or prize pool in a skill-measurement or game context
User is building a skill arena (coding, research, agentic, negotiation) or a reference game implementation (puzzle, word, match, retro arcade, speedrun, rhythm, trivia, typing, math)
User asks how to measure or score skill, or how to track skill across users or agents
User wants on-chain verifiable submissions resolved by replay attestation or staked resolution
User wants permissionless sponsor-funded payout pools
User is integrating Base Account / Builder Code revenue share, or the @skillos/mcp prepare/complete flow, into a skill arena or game project
when_NOT_to_invoke: Real-time multiplayer (FPS, MOBA, fighting, racing) — skill-luck balance is wrong
Single-player narrative experiences — no competitive or measurable-skill layer
Card-based gambling (poker, blackjack, slots) — out of scope (legal exposure exponential)
Production mainnet deployments before Q3 2026 — arenas run on Base Sepolia testnet now; mainnet is audit-gated, targeted Q3 2026

filesystem_read.purpose: Read game source, package.json, tsconfig.json to identify integration points

filesystem_write.purpose: Scaffold SkillOSProvider wrapper, score-submit boilerplate, builder-code wiring helper
filesystem_write.scope: Project source tree (app/, src/, components/) only — never .env, never system files, never outside repo root

shell_execution.purpose: npm install, npm run dev, npm test, cast call (read-only), curl GET, git status/diff
shell_execution.scope: Whitelisted commands only; never cast send, never rm -rf, never git push without explicit user approval

network_access.purpose: Base Sepolia RPC, Blockscout, BaseScan, api.skillos.network, api.base.dev (builder-code lookup)
network_access.scope: Read-only HTTP GET / RPC eth_call to whitelisted hosts only
